data.name: Witch Story
data.detailed_description:
在一個王國里，有一個住在人跡罕至的女巫。 她忙於煉金術、魔藥製作、算命、嚇人和其他魔法。據說她已經在這裡生活了幾個世紀。 當地的領主受夠了這樣的街區。 王國聲名狼藉，百姓惶恐，他的力量正在減弱。

他們不能派軍隊去找女巫，因為他們不確定軍隊是否會成功……還有什麼領主膽戰心驚地召集軍隊對付一個女人？ 他們決定悄悄解決問題，所以派了一個英雄來打敗她！ 然後又一個……再兩個……最後主派了一個新英雄，他必須把所有的指控都讀給女巫，然後把她送進監獄！


在遊戲中，您的目標是收集拼圖以恢復圖片。✧(>^.^)>*：･ﾟ✧

特點

  • 🔥 視覺小說
  • 🔥 美麗的藝術品
  • 🔥動畫場景
  • 🔥 CG畫廊模式
  • 🔥 輕鬆的音樂

    輕鬆獲勝：鍵盤 Сtrl+D - 完成關卡

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 RAM GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: with 1 GB VRAM compatible with DirectX
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Compatible with DirectX
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Witch Story
data.detailed_description:
In a kingdom, there is a witch who lives off the beaten track. She is busy with alchemy, potion-making, fortune-telling ,frightening people and other magic..They say she has already lived for a few centuries here. The local lord is fed up with such neighbourhood. The kingdom earned notoriety, the common people are terrified,his power is weakening.

They can`t send the army to the witch, as they are not sure if the army will succeed… And what a lord is frightened enough to raise an army against a woman? They decided to settle things quietly ,so a Hero was sent to beat her! Then another one… And then two more… Finally the Lord sends a new hero ,who has to read all accusations to the witch and take her to prison!


In the game, your goal is to collect the puzzle in order to restore the pictures.✧(>^.^)>*: ･ﾟ✧

FEATURES

  • 🔥 Visual novel
  • 🔥 Beautiful artwork
  • 🔥 Animation scenes
  • 🔥 CG Gallery Mode
  • 🔥 Relaxing music

    Easy win: Keyboard Сtrl+D - Complete Level

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 (or equivalent)
  • Memory: 4 RAM GB RAM
  • Graphics: with 1 GB VRAM compatible with DirectX
  • Storage: 1000 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Compatible with DirectX
